notes: All systems nominal. Rotor blade visual inspection passed. Firmware v2.1.3 confirmed.
Scheduled 500-hour service. Bearing play within spec (0.002mm). Lubricant applied per procedure RT-204.
Updated flight control software to v2.2.0. Includes improved vibration dampening algorithm. Ground-tested successfully.
Dust accumulation reducing charge efficiency by ~8%. Cleaned with compressed gas. Post-cleaning efficiency restored to 97%.
Scheduled 1000-cycle inspection. Microscopic edge erosion noted on Blade 2 leading edge — within acceptable limits per spec RT-105. Recommended monitoring at next inspection.
Battery capacity at 94% of original. Degradation curve tracking nominal. No action required.
IMU drift correction applied. Altimeter recalibrated. Nav camera alignment verified.

Unscheduled inspection following Flight 38 vibration note. Bearing play measured at 0.003mm — approaching upper spec limit of 0.004mm. Lubrication refreshed. Recommended: plan bearing replacement at next resupply window.
Patch v2.2.1 applied to adjust vibration monitoring thresholds based on MA-008 findings. Alert threshold lowered from 0.20g to 0.186g.

Follow-up to MA-005. Blade 2 leading edge erosion has progressed slightly but remains within spec. Blade 4 shows initial signs of similar erosion. Bearing play at 0.0035mm. Recommend bearing replacement before Flight 55.
